You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/kuadrant-console-plugin/source/src/components/KuadrantDNSPolicyCreatePage.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 400
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
  399                />
  400                <Button variant="link" onClick={handleCancelResource}>
  401                  {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 14
Rule [family:ExpandableSection]:
## ExpandableSection Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <ExpandableSection contentId={...} direction={...} displaySize={...} isDetached={...} isExpanded={...} isIndented={...} isWidthLimited={...} onToggle={...}>
    <ExpandableSectionToggle contentId={...} direction={...} hasTruncatedContent={...} isDetached={...} isExpanded={...} onToggle={...} toggleId={...}>
      <ExpandableSection />
    </ExpandableSectionToggle>
  </ExpandableSection>
```

Props that stay on <ExpandableSection>: contentId, direction, displaySize, isDetached, isExpanded, isIndented, isWidthLimited, onToggle, toggleContent, toggleId, toggleText, toggleTextCollapsed, toggleTextExpanded, truncateMaxLines, variant

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  isActive -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 14: [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-expandablesection-expandablesection-d-ts-expandablesectionprops-signature-changed]
    importedName: ExpandableSection
    localName: ExpandableSection
    module: @patternfly/react-core
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: PropTypeChange
      From: React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>
      To: Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'onToggle'>

Code contexts:
  (line 14):
   13    Button,
   14    ExpandableSection,
   15    ActionGroup,



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 3
Line: 400
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  399                />
  400                <Button variant="link" onClick={handleCancelResource}>
  401                  {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 4
Lines: 347, 364
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 347):
  346                  <HelperText>
  347                    <HelperTextItem>{t('Unique name of the DNS Policy')}</HelperTextItem>
  348                  </HelperText>

  (line 364):
  363                  <HelperText>
  364                    <HelperTextItem>
  365                      {t(

```

### Fix 5
Lines: 296, 332
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 296):
  295        </Helmet>
  296        <PageSection variant="light" className="pf-m-no-padding">
  297          <div className="co-m-nav-title">

  (line 332):
  331        {createView === 'form' ? (
  332          <PageSection variant="light">
  333            <Form className="co-m-pane__form">

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/kuadrant-console-plugin/source/src/components/KuadrantDNSPolicyCreatePage.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 400):** `Button variant="link"` — The type changed to add `'stateful'` but `"link"` is still valid. No code change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 14):** `ExpandableSection` signature changed — the base type changed from `React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>` to `Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'onToggle'>`. The removed prop `isActive` is not used in this file. The `ExpandableSection` usage at lines 372 and 384 uses `toggleText`, `className`, `isExpanded`, and `onToggle` — all still valid props. No code change needed.

**Fix 3 (Line 400):** Button icon-to-prop migration. Looking at line 400-402:
```jsx
<Button variant="link" onClick={handleCancelResource}>
  {t('Cancel')}
</Button>
```
The children is just text `{t('Cancel')}`, no icon. No change needed.

**Fix 4 (Lines 347, 364):** HelperTextItem icon-to-prop migration. Looking at:
- Line 347: `<HelperTextItem>{t('Unique name of the DNS Policy')}</HelperTextItem>` — text only, no icon.
- Line 364-368: `<HelperTextItem>{t(...)}</HelperTextItem>` — text only, no icon.
No change needed for icon migration.

**Fix 5 (Lines 296, 332):** `PageSection variant="light"` → `variant="default"`. The value `"light"` is no longer valid. `"default"` is the appropriate replacement for `"light"` in PatternFly v6.

Let me apply the changes:
Now let me verify the final state of the file:

Both `PageSection` changes are confirmed. The file is correct.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. The type only added `'stateful'`; no existing values were removed. |
| **Fix 2** | `ExpandableSection` signature changed | **No change needed** | The base type changed from `React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>` to `Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'onToggle'>`. The removed prop `isActive` is not used anywhere in this file. The `onToggle` prop is passed via PF's own `ExpandableSectionProps`, not via `HTMLProps`, so existing usage is unaffected. |
| **Fix 3** | `Button` icon-children-to-prop | **No change needed** | The `<Button>` at line 400 contains only text children (`{t('Cancel')}`), no icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule does not apply to text-only buttons. |
| **Fix 4** | `HelperTextItem` icon-children-to-prop | **No change needed** | Both `<HelperTextItem>` instances (lines 347 and 364) contain only text children — no icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons` are present. The rule does not apply. |
| **Fix 5** | `PageSection variant="light"` removed | **Applied** | Changed `variant="light"` to `variant="default"` at both line 296 and line 332. `"default"` is the PF v6 replacement for the removed `"light"` value. |
